classification_definitions.api_bound_json_schema: The request carries response_format.type=json_schema through the provider payload builder.
classification_definitions.plain_text: The request omits response_format and accepts the returned message content as text.
classification_definitions.prompt_only_json: A prompt asks for JSON while the request has no API-bound response schema; no dedicated current request class was identified.
classification_definitions.partially_validated: Application parsing checks part of the contract but does not enforce every closed-schema or business invariant.
classification_definitions.not_implemented: No production request owner or endpoint call exists.

summary.provider_contract: OpenRouter-compatible cloud, Polza-compatible cloud, and LM Studio local compat all use POST {compat_base}/chat/completions. Provider builders alter headers, cache/usage fields, output limits, and local thinking controls but pass response_format unchanged when supplied.
summary.native_lmstudio_boundary: Native /api/v1/* is used for health and lifecycle, not content generation; generation uses /v1/chat/completions.

request_classes.source_scope: existing application text or reprocess input

validation.notes: Thinking tags are stripped; no completeness, protected-value, or boundary validator is applied.

retry_fallback.transport_retry: timeout, rate-limit, and server classes use exponential backoff; LM Studio can receive one additional readiness retry
retry_fallback.fallback: surface failure and retain original text

request_shape.messages: microphone source-view prompt with one current-text chunk in the normal short case
request_shape.queue_owner: direct coordinator; not shared file queue

retry_fallback.model_load_failure: explicit degraded postprocessing error before success event
retry_fallback.fallback: raw transcription text remains available and postprocessed_text is not populated as success

persistence.identity_owner: TranscriptionResult generates UUID and created_at before LLM processing

request_classes.source_scope: microphone text exceeding configured chunk size without blocks-mode routing

request_shape.messages: independent character chunks with configured overlap and optional context placeholders
request_shape.chunking: configured character size and overlap; sentence-boundary adjustment when available

response_contract.shape: one free-text response per chunk, merged by application request index

retry_fallback.orchestration: fatal errors stop successful completion of the postprocessing job

persistence.timestamp_owner: application speech segments; model output has no timestamp contract

request_classes.source_scope: audio or video file shared-queue LLM tail when blocks mode is unavailable or not selected

request_shape.messages: media source-view prompt over character chunks

response_contract.shape: one free-text response per chunk, merged by application order

retry_fallback.transport_retry: common client policy inside a queue-level timeout budget
retry_fallback.fallback: already-saved transcription remains available for later reprocess

persistence.record_flow: speech result is saved before the LLM tail; postprocessing updates the existing record
persistence.identity_owner: queue job UUID and transcription UUID are separate application-owned handles

request_classes.source_scope: persisted microphone/media blocks, queue tail, standalone reprocess, and bulk reprocess when blocks exist

request_shape.messages: prompt content includes {blocks:[{id,text}]}; timestamps are not sent as output fields
request_shape.chunking: application plans chunks on block boundaries

response_contract.shape: intended closed object with blocks array

validation.notes: The parser converts text to string and checks missing expected IDs, but it does not explicitly enforce exact count, uniqueness, or returned order.

retry_fallback.application_retry: one additional retry for invalid JSON or expected-ID omission
retry_fallback.fallback: original blocks are returned unchanged after exhausted application retry

persistence.timestamp_owner: stored block start/end values; never model-authored

persistence.notes: The field exists but no per-chunk summary request or persistence owner was found.
No direct full-recording request, hierarchical synthesis, update owner, or read-back gate was found.

request_shape.messages: system message plus user multipart content containing text and one image data URI

retry_fallback.lmstudio_reasoning_content_fallback: allowed only when normal content is empty and reasoning_content contains parseable structured JSON for an image request
retry_fallback.fallback: job failure; no plain-text vision fallback

persistence.identity_owner: TranscriptionResult UUID and created_at; queue job UUID remains separate

application_owned_state.transcription_identity: UUID generated in application code unless supplied
application_owned_state.queue_identity: separate UUID with queue lifecycle timestamps
application_owned_state.speech_segments: segment IDs and start/end timestamps remain application-owned
application_owned_state.blocks: block index and start/end timestamps remain application/storage-owned; the model echoes only id and authors text
application_owned_state.vision: image/transcription identity, dimensions, file linkage, and persistence key remain outside the model schema
application_owned_state.retry_and_fallback: attempt eligibility, accepted attempt, original text, and persistence outcome remain application-owned

gaps: Plain-text cleanup has no deterministic response schema or semantic acceptance layer.
Blocks post-parse validation does not explicitly enforce duplicate rejection, exact count, returned order, or strict text typing.
Vision post-parse validation defaults missing fields and can recover malformed JSON without a persisted layered verdict.
Summary storage exists without a request, validator, retry, fallback, synthesis, or persistence owner.
No production flow persists separate transport, raw-parse, schema, business-identity, semantic, and product-behavior verdicts.
Provider support for response_format is transport capability, not evidence that a task contract is safe.
non_claims: This inventory is source-contract evidence, not executed model evidence.
Prompt files and private user content were not inspected or reproduced.
No live endpoint, model, provider, persistence round trip, or UI flow was exercised.
The inventory does not claim summary support, semantic correctness, model admission, audio accuracy, OCR accuracy, or migration readiness.
